title: One Direction: This Is Us
posterAlt: One Direction: This Is Us (2013) movie poster
tmdbOverview: "One Direction: This Is Us" is a captivating and intimate all-access look at life on the road for the global music phenomenon. Weaved with stunning live concert footage, this inspiring feature film tells the remarkable story of Niall, Zayn, Liam, Harry and Louis' meteoric rise to fame, from their humble hometown beginnings and competing on the X-Factor, to conquering the world and performing at London’s famed O2 Arena. Hear it from the boys themselves and see through their own eyes what it's really like to be One Direction.
synopsis: One Direction: This Is Us is a 2013 documentary and music film from United States and United Kingdom. It has a 4.4 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a PG certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
